ValidationRule.description: Primary, Secondary, and Tertiary payer roles must use payer order 1, 2, or 3.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Payer_Role__c, "Primary"), ISPICKVAL(Payer_Role__c, "Secondary"), ISPICKVAL(Payer_Role__c, "Tertiary") ), OR( ISBLANK(Payer_Order__c), Payer_Order__c < 1, Payer_Order__c > 3 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Payer order must be 1, 2, or 3 for Primary, Secondary, and Tertiary payer roles.
